title: Calculating a Score within a Board
excerpt:

posts.author: ajhale21 (Amie Hale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are using a board to gather inputs for a project risk score assessment. The field inputs should total a score. I cannot figure out how to write the formula column to calculate the final score. Can someone please help me with how to adjust this board or form to facilitate the automatic score calculation?

Here is the board and form:

image2863×803 161 KB

image1408×971 59.8 KB

We would like the Risk Score to automatically calculate and then populate the Risk Tier column if the score reaches a specific threshold.

image2530×578 58.7 KB

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI Amie,

You may want to look at this blog article: CHALLENGE #1: How to use a Risk Assessment Matrix in monday.com | mdBoosters Blog

Hope it helps.
